heading: Crediting amounts received for certain Reserve or National Guard service
label: 5519 Crediting amounts received for certain Reserve or National Guard service
text: An amount (other than a travel, transportation, or per diem allowance) received by an employee or individual for military service as a member of the Reserve or National Guard for a period for which he is granted military leave under section 6323(b) shall be credited against the pay payable to the employee or individual with respect to his civilian position for that period.
notes: Amendments2021— struck out “or (c)” after “section 6323(b)”.Pub. L. 117–811996— substituted “granted military leave” for “entitled to leave”.Pub. L. 104–1061992— substituted “6323(b) or (c)” for “6323(c) or (d) of this title”.Pub. L. 102–378

Application of 2021 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–81, div. A, title XI, § 1109(b)135 Stat. 1951Dec. 27, 2021“The amendment made by subsection (a) [amending this section] shall apply to any amounts credited, by operation of such section 5519, against the pay of an employee or individual described under section 6323(c) of such title on or after the date of enactment of this Act [].”Dec. 27, 2021
